Luna's Story

✦ ✦ ✦

Once upon a time, there was a moth that hatched out of its cocoon in a cramped space, and instead of having room for her wings to fully spread and dry properly, they hardened into a crumpled mess. She became unable to fly, unable to pursue her normal life's purpose of finding a mate. Instead, she had to patiently wait on a plant outside near a light — waiting for the unknown to occur until her days were complete.

But thankfully, despite her damaged state, a mate came to her instead and they were able to fulfill their purpose — and she laid eggs before her days ended.

✿ ✾ ✿

Sometimes we find ourselves broken by wounds from others or our own choices in life. By God's grace, we don't have to stay broken — and He can redeem our story and help us achieve the purpose He created us for.

Call on the name of the Lord Jesus Christ today
and allow Him to bring cleansing & healing into your life.

Psalm 51:10
Create in me a clean heart, O God;
and renew a right spirit within me.

❧   A story of grace and redemption   ❧
